{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/262839898?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bugbunny-research", "id": 262839898, "login": "bugbunny-research", "node_id": "U_kgDOD6qeWg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-27806", "cvss": {"score": 7.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-78", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')"}], "description": "## Summary

The Orbit agent's FileVault disk encryption key rotation flow on collects a local user's password via a GUI dialog and interpolates it directly into a Tcl/expect script executed via `exec.Command("expect", "-c", script)`. Because the password is inserted into Tcl brace-quoted `send {%s}`, a password containing `}` terminates the literal and injects arbitrary Tcl commands. Since Orbit runs as root, this allows a local unprivileged user to escalate to root privileges.

## CWE

- **CWE-78**: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')
- **CWE-94**: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')

## Impact

- Local privilege escalation to root: Any unprivileged local user on a managed endpoint can execute arbitrary commands as root

## Credit

This vulnerability was discovered and reported by [bugbunny.ai](https://bugbunny.ai).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00111, "percentile": 0.01582}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rphv-h674-5hp2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-08T18:03:52Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rphv-h674-5hp2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rphv-h674-5hp2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-27806"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-08T19:25:13Z", "published_at": "2026-04-08T18:03:52Z", "references": ["https://github.com/fleetdm/fleet/security/advisories/GHSA-rphv-h674-5hp2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rphv-h674-5hp2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/fleetdm/fleet/security-advisories/GHSA-rphv-h674-5hp2", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/fleetdm/fleet", "summary": "Fleet Affected by Local Privilege Escalation via Tcl Command Injection in Orbit", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T20:20:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rphv-h674-5hp2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.81.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/fleetdm/fleet/v4"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.81.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Fleet Affected by Local Privilege Escalation via Tcl Command Injection in Orbit
